title: When We Are Married
writer: Barbara K. Emary, Austin Melford, J.B. Priestley
actors: Sydney Howard, Raymond Huntley, Olga Lindo
plot: The Helliwells, the Soppitts, and the Parkers are old friends gathered to celebrate their silver anniversaries. To their dismay they learn that their marriages may not be valid. On hand are an outrageous housekeeper and a photogra...
